title: senecio ticsanicus
intro: Senecio ticsanicus, also known as Tica Senecio, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Peru. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio ticsanicus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
